inline_json_options_prod.line_excerpt: var json = JsonSerializer.Serialize(input, new JsonSerializerOptions { WriteIndented = false });
inline_json_options_prod.detail: Production code constructs ad-hoc JsonSerializerOptions. Use DINOForge.SDK.Json.JsonOptions.Default or a project-specific static holder under src/<Project>/Json/. Inline options drift between read/write paths and mask asymmetric naming-policy bugs.
